detectors.description:
Reentrancy in INUendo._transfer(address,address,uint256) (INUendo.sol#719-843):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (INUendo.sol#783)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (INUendo.sol#857-869)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (INUendo.sol#789)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(tfrAmt) (INUendo.sol#879)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.sub(tfrAmt)) (INUendo.sol#881)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (INUendo.sol#841)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (INUendo.sol#999)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (INUendo.sol#979)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (INUendo.sol#981)
	INUendo._rOwned (INUendo.sol#379) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- INUendo._takeTeam(uint256) (INUendo.sol#993-1001)
	- INUendo._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (INUendo.sol#953-989)
	- INUendo.balanceOf(address) (INUendo.sol#545-549)
	- INUendo.constructor() (INUendo.sol#471-501)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (INUendo.sol#841)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (INUendo.sol#1007)
	INUendo._rTotal (INUendo.sol#399) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- INUendo._getCurrentSupply() (INUendo.sol#1149-1159)
	- INUendo._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (INUendo.sol#1005-1011)
	- INUendo.constructor() (INUendo.sol#471-501)
	- INUendo.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (INUendo.sol#641-663)
